rationale: Stale code-index corrupts all downstream verdicts, including A and B. Resynchronizing ensures constitutional integrity checks are based on current data.
risk_if_other_side_wins: Delayed code-index sync creates systemic pollution, invalidating all P0 findings and enabling irreversible constitutional violations.
